(AI Generated).

## Freed v26.6.101-dev

Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn sync now share the same lower-profile feed scrolling behavior, with stronger Facebook auth checks to avoid false zero-post success and desktop sidebar reopen smoke are now more stable

### Fixes

- Bug fixes and improvements

### Downloads

**macOS:** `.dmg` (Apple Silicon or Intel, signed + notarized)  
**Windows:** `.exe` (NSIS installer)  
**Linux:** `.AppImage`  

> macOS downloads are signed and notarized for normal Gatekeeper installation.
